title: A Voice on the Radio
content: During a late-night drive, Hannah tuned an old portable radio to a local station. Between songs, she suddenly heard someone calling her first name. Surprised, she checked the display, wondering whether the message had been directed at her. Moments later, the announcer explained that listeners had submitted birthday greetings for friends and relatives. Another woman with the same name had received the message. Hannah laughed at the coincidence and continued driving, realizing that sometimes mysterious moments are simply unexpected coincidences.
